description_wiki: Pietraroja  is  a mountain comune (municipality) in the province of Benevento in Campania, southern Italy.
Benevento (Italian: [beneˈvɛnto] ; Beneventano: Biniviento [biniˈvjendə]) is a city and comune (municipality) of Campania, Italy, capital of the province of Benevento.
Italy, officially the Italian Republic, is a country in Southern and Western Europe.

aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.
Cassano delle Murge (Barese: Casséne) is a town and comune in the Metropolitan City of Bari, Apulia, southern Italy.

Apulia ( ə-POO-lee-ə), also known by its Italian name Puglia (Italian: [ˈpuʎʎa]), is a region of Italy, located in the southern peninsular section of the country, bordering the Adriatic Sea to the east, the Strait of Otranto and Ionian Sea to the southeast and the Gulf of Taranto to the south.
Acquaviva delle Fonti (Barese: Iacquavìve [jakːwaˈviːvə]; known as just Acquaviva until 1863) is a town and comune of 20,446 inhabitants, in the Metropolitan City of Bari, in Apulia, Italy.

aliases: University of Notre Dame du Lac
University of Notre Dame, South Bend
description: Catholic university located in Notre Dame, Indiana, United States
description_wiki: The University of Notre Dame du Lac (known simply as Notre Dame;   NOH-tər-DAYM; ND) is a private Catholic research university in Notre Dame, Indiana, United States.

description: public research university in Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: The University of Minnesota Twin Cities (historically known as University of Minnesota) is a public land-grant research university in the Twin Cities of Minneapolis and Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States.
